title: Rhymes & Punchlines: Stand-up Night with Himanshu Bawandar
description: When sharp rhythm meets perfect comic timing. This gallery captures a high-energy night of shared stage presence, blending the depth of performance poetry with the raw, fast-paced humor of stand-up comedy alongside Himanshu Bawandar. A spectacular evening where every rhyme landed with a punchline and the laughter didn't stop
